response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience as a Staff Software Engineer and has worked with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. They possess the required technical skills, including distributed systems and high-throughput architectures, and have experience with Python and TypeScript.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong background in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures
Proficient in multiple programming languages, including TypeScript and Python
concerns: No direct experience with LLM or ML products
Limited experience with Agile methodology mentioned
No clear indication of operational readiness and incident-response capability
